evals.prompt: I'm reading paper 2406.11434, can you grab all the figures for me?
evals.expected_output: All figures from paper 2406.11434 downloaded to outputs/figures/2406_11434/figures/ with captions.json

assertions.name: figures_downloaded
assertions.check: At least 4 .png/.jpg figure files exist in the output directory

assertions.name: captions_json_exists
assertions.check: A captions.json file is present in the output directory

assertions.name: captions_json_valid
assertions.check: captions.json contains entries with label, caption, and file/files fields

assertions.name: correct_output_path
assertions.check: Files are saved under a path containing the arxiv ID

evals.prompt: I need the architecture diagram from https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.11805 for my presentation slides
evals.expected_output: Figures listed, architecture diagram identified and downloaded, file path provided for use in slides

assertions.name: figure_downloaded
assertions.check: At least 1 figure file (.png/.jpg) exists in the output directory

assertions.name: architecture_identified
assertions.check: The output or captions reference an architecture/overview/framework figure

assertions.name: file_path_reported
assertions.check: The agent response mentions the specific file path for use in slides

evals.prompt: What figures does paper 2401.12948 have? Just list them, I don't want to download yet
evals.expected_output: Figures listed with captions and panel counts, no files downloaded

assertions.name: no_files_downloaded
assertions.check: No image files (.png/.jpg/.svg) were saved to the output directory

assertions.name: figures_listed
assertions.check: The listing output contains figure labels and captions

assertions.name: listing_saved
assertions.check: A figures_listing.json or equivalent structured output file exists
